programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A man is unjustly accused of being an outsider when he tries to use the community trash cans; chaos ensues when two old-timers clash over the same disabled parking spot; a high school soccer player tackles a neighborhood package thief.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A couple goes head-to-head with a neighbor whose backyard bonfires keep lighting up the block; a feud flares up over backyard lights, grocery bags and everything in between; a woman's backyard barrier sets off a clash with her neighbor.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: A family in Texas puts up a security light which enrages their next-door neighbor; in New York, a woman and a neighboring couple argue over the placement of their shared trash bins.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Fond du Lac, Wisconsin, a parking dispute escalates on the day a man is expecting an important delivery; in Pennsylvania, a landlord and tenant clash after a mailbox is replaced without permission; and in Brooksville, Florida, a woman's patience is in the crosshairs when her neighbor sets up a backyard shooting range.

programme.title: Neighborhood Wars
programme.desc: In Michigan, a dispute over shared driveway parking puts neighbors at odds; in Ohio, a simple mail mix-up sparks an outsized reaction; and in Chicago, a routine move-out inspection turns into a heated showdown between renters and their landlord.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Trey's dream home renovation turns into a nightmare when he discovers squatters have taken over his Atlanta property; after forcing out two occupants, he's left battling a defiant holdout and a brazen fake landlord scheme fueling the chaos; but when Flash and his team arrive, they quickly realize this case will require a very different approach.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, three sisters call on Flash after squatters take over their late grandfather's property; the house has been transformed into a hoarder's den, the backyard into a full-blown junkyard, and squatters seem to appear at every turn; to take back the home, Flash sets his sights on the ringleader, hoping the rest will finally fall in line.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: A deputy and his K9 wade through the murky waters of a Georgia swamp to catch a submerged felon; in Louisiana's Cajun country, a suspect escapes into a gator-filled bayou; a man accused of armed robbery takes the plunge, and a deputy dons his heroic cape to save a drowning pup.

programme.title: Swamp Patrol
programme.desc: In Florida, troopers risk life and limb wading through gator-infested swamps to track a suspect; a thief in Georgia is close to becoming gator feed to evade capture; a man acting erratically makes a surprising getaway and a gator comes between a woman and her pizza.
